## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss ongoing projects, team structure, and strategic priorities for growthx.ai](https://fathom.video/share/ibTvYvx7rm_Dzm_Fjo-vvcgXmp9qG56d?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Engineering teams are focused on three main products: ContentOS, AI Framework, and Task Hub](https://fathom.video/share/ibTvYvx7rm_Dzm_Fjo-vvcgXmp9qG56d?tab=summary&timestamp=1442.0)
  - [Sales team needs immediate support and structure; Bridget to assist Kyle with sales processes](https://fathom.video/share/ibTvYvx7rm_Dzm_Fjo-vvcgXmp9qG56d?tab=summary&timestamp=403.0)
  - [Company is currently overstaffed due to client churn; potential restructuring or layoffs may be necessary](https://fathom.video/share/ibTvYvx7rm_Dzm_Fjo-vvcgXmp9qG56d?tab=summary&timestamp=1236.0)
  - [AirOps migration is critical priority; training and onboarding for new system to be scheduled for early June](https://fathom.video/share/ibTvYvx7rm_Dzm_Fjo-vvcgXmp9qG56d?tab=summary&timestamp=944.0)

## Topics

### Engineering Roadmap

  - [ContentOS to replace AirTable, Notion, and AirOps](https://fathom.video/share/ibTvYvx7rm_Dzm_Fjo-vvcgXmp9qG56d?tab=summary&timestamp=1447.0)
      - [Priority features: AirOps exit, Content Inventory, Production, Assignments](https://fathom.video/share/ibTvYvx7rm_Dzm_Fjo-vvcgXmp9qG56d?tab=summary&timestamp=1458.0)
      - [Timeline: Aiming for September launch, with alpha testing for existing clients](https://fathom.video/share/ibTvYvx7rm_Dzm_Fjo-vvcgXmp9qG56d?tab=summary&timestamp=2052.0)
  - [AI Framework for workflow creation](https://fathom.video/share/ibTvYvx7rm_Dzm_Fjo-vvcgXmp9qG56d?tab=summary&timestamp=1743.0)
      - [Key components: Composer agent, Build mode, Execution tracing, Publish workflow](https://fathom.video/share/ibTvYvx7rm_Dzm_Fjo-vvcgXmp9qG56d?tab=summary&timestamp=1770.0)
      - [Team: Flint, Giampiero, Stefano, and potentially Ben](https://fathom.video/share/ibTvYvx7rm_Dzm_Fjo-vvcgXmp9qG56d?tab=summary&timestamp=1960.0)
  - [Task Hub for CEM layer task management](https://fathom.video/share/ibTvYvx7rm_Dzm_Fjo-vvcgXmp9qG56d?tab=summary&timestamp=2100.0)
      - [Currently unstaffed; considering manual version with Linear tickets as interim solution](https://fathom.video/share/ibTvYvx7rm_Dzm_Fjo-vvcgXmp9qG56d?tab=summary&timestamp=2132.0)

### Team Structure and Hiring

  - [Client ops engineering team needs additional staffing:](https://fathom.video/share/ibTvYvx7rm_Dzm_Fjo-vvcgXmp9qG56d?tab=summary&timestamp=2160.0)
      - [1 full-stack engineer](https://fathom.video/share/ibTvYvx7rm_Dzm_Fjo-vvcgXmp9qG56d?tab=summary&timestamp=2160.0)
      - [1 designer with front-end capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/ibTvYvx7rm_Dzm_Fjo-vvcgXmp9qG56d?tab=summary&timestamp=2160.0)
      - [1 AI workflow-focused person](https://fathom.video/share/ibTvYvx7rm_Dzm_Fjo-vvcgXmp9qG56d?tab=summary&timestamp=2160.0)
  - [Considering agencies on retainer for CMS and front-end work](https://fathom.video/share/ibTvYvx7rm_Dzm_Fjo-vvcgXmp9qG56d?tab=summary&timestamp=2196.0)
  - [Potential new growth lead hire with app-building experience](https://fathom.video/share/ibTvYvx7rm_Dzm_Fjo-vvcgXmp9qG56d?tab=summary&timestamp=2254.0)

### Sales Team Challenges

  - [Kyle (new sales lead) needs support in defining roles, responsibilities, and processes](https://fathom.video/share/ibTvYvx7rm_Dzm_Fjo-vvcgXmp9qG56d?tab=summary&timestamp=414.0)
  - [Bridget to assist with implementing basic sales structures and qualification processes](https://fathom.video/share/ibTvYvx7rm_Dzm_Fjo-vvcgXmp9qG56d?tab=summary&timestamp=403.0)
  - [Marcel to remain involved in high-level sales strategy and client meetings](https://fathom.video/share/ibTvYvx7rm_Dzm_Fjo-vvcgXmp9qG56d?tab=summary&timestamp=519.0)

### Agency Operations

  - [Discussions on cadence, engineering support, and structure for agency motions](https://fathom.video/share/ibTvYvx7rm_Dzm_Fjo-vvcgXmp9qG56d?tab=summary&timestamp=338.0)
  - [Considering separating strategy, discovery, concept, and execution phases](https://fathom.video/share/ibTvYvx7rm_Dzm_Fjo-vvcgXmp9qG56d?tab=summary&timestamp=145.0)
  - [Exploring different team structures (e.g., strategic vs. commercial accounts, industry-based teams)](https://fathom.video/share/ibTvYvx7rm_Dzm_Fjo-vvcgXmp9qG56d?tab=summary&timestamp=1293.0)

### Staffing and Churn

  - [Company is overstaffed by approximately 10 people due to client churn](https://fathom.video/share/ibTvYvx7rm_Dzm_Fjo-vvcgXmp9qG56d?tab=summary&timestamp=1236.0)
  - [Ending April with only 44 accounts, down from previous projections](https://fathom.video/share/ibTvYvx7rm_Dzm_Fjo-vvcgXmp9qG56d?tab=summary&timestamp=1236.0)
  - [Potential restructuring or layoffs may be necessary, particularly in delivery roles](https://fathom.video/share/ibTvYvx7rm_Dzm_Fjo-vvcgXmp9qG56d?tab=summary&timestamp=1223.0)

### AirOps Migration

  - [Critical priority for the coming weeks](https://fathom.video/share/ibTvYvx7rm_Dzm_Fjo-vvcgXmp9qG56d?tab=summary&timestamp=944.0)
  - [Training and onboarding for new system scheduled for early June (tentatively June 10th)](https://fathom.video/share/ibTvYvx7rm_Dzm_Fjo-vvcgXmp9qG56d?tab=summary&timestamp=1045.0)
  - [Need to prepare for unexpected workflows and processes currently used by team members](https://fathom.video/share/ibTvYvx7rm_Dzm_Fjo-vvcgXmp9qG56d?tab=summary&timestamp=1001.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Schedule AirOps migration training for early June (tentatively June 10th)](https://fathom.video/share/ibTvYvx7rm_Dzm_Fjo-vvcgXmp9qG56d?tab=summary&timestamp=1045.0)
  - [Bridget to assist Kyle in developing basic sales processes and structures](https://fathom.video/share/ibTvYvx7rm_Dzm_Fjo-vvcgXmp9qG56d?tab=summary&timestamp=403.0)
  - [Daniel to finalize engineering roadmap and timelines in Linear](https://fathom.video/share/ibTvYvx7rm_Dzm_Fjo-vvcgXmp9qG56d?tab=summary&timestamp=1946.0)
  - [Consider bringing Andy onsite for director meetings in the coming weeks](https://fathom.video/share/ibTvYvx7rm_Dzm_Fjo-vvcgXmp9qG56d?tab=summary&timestamp=368.0)
  - [Explore options for delegating AirOps migration tasks and training](https://fathom.video/share/ibTvYvx7rm_Dzm_Fjo-vvcgXmp9qG56d?tab=summary&timestamp=1496.0)
  - [Monitor client churn and prepare for potential team restructuring](https://fathom.video/share/ibTvYvx7rm_Dzm_Fjo-vvcgXmp9qG56d?tab=summary&timestamp=1261.0)
  - [Schedule follow-up meeting with Andy to discuss operations and delivery team structure](https://fathom.video/share/ibTvYvx7rm_Dzm_Fjo-vvcgXmp9qG56d?tab=summary&timestamp=2571.0)
